title: Peruvian Black Bean Pilaf
description: A flavorful and nutritious Peruvian-inspired pilaf dish made with black beans and a hint of sweetness.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the aji amarillo pepper and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the pilaf and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the cooked black beans, sweet, and salt. Stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5-7 minutes, until the liquid has been absorbed.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
